resources.string: See yourself as a reader for the first time.
Private by design. Your reading life stays on your device.

string-array.name: paywall_features
string-array.item: Shelves for any mood, genre, or project — no limits
See your pace, page speed, and mood trends
Compare your reading year over year at a glance
Your reading personality, every year you\'ve tracked
Find your next book by how you want to feel
Protect your streak when life gets in the way
Build personal challenges — no preset limits
A reading timer that shows how you actually read

resources.string: 7 days free, then your chosen plan. Cancel any time. No commitment.
No active subscription was found for this Google account.
